book_summary: 2 John has complete one-chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layer. The letter preserves truth and love together, the chosen lady ambiguity, the beginning command to love one another, embodied Messiah confession, and careful hospitality boundaries against harmful teaching.
translation_notes: Chosen lady may be a woman leader/host or personified assembly; ambiguity preserved.
Hospitality boundaries concern harmful teaching, not fear of outsiders.
Discernment language is guarded against paranoia or modern target-mapping.
source_witness_audit_flags: 2 John 1 chosen lady identity and hospitality boundary reception history.
next_actions: Continue Batch C with 3 John and Jude.
